name: skillcatalog
description: Extra skills extending Claude/Copilot/Codex base capabilities

skills.name: demo-skill
skills.description: Demonstration skill used to validate the SkillCatalog install pipeline across Claude, Copilot, and Codex. Activate when verifying that a skill installs correctly.

skills.name: safety-ssh
skills.description: Safe, credential-free SSH to remote servers — the assistant works only through a named connection and never sees or types passwords, usernames, hostnames, or IPs. Use this skill to actually carry out any task that lives on another machine — a server, box, host, VM, instance, prod/staging environment, build or CI agent, database server, or jump/bastion host. If fulfilling the request means logging in over SSH and doing something there — restart or bounce a service, deploy, prune docker images, dump a schema, free up disk, tail or grep remote logs, run df/du/systemctl — this is the skill, and it is the required path for doing it. Treat these as triggers: "ssh into…", "log into…", "connect to my server and…", "hop to the internal host and…", a pasted `ssh user@host`, a bare IP, or an offered SSH password/key/.env secret. Not for local-only SSH: making keys, git publickey errors, explaining ssh flags or agent forwarding, passphrases, or local rsync.
